query:
INSERT INTO testimonials (brandName, quote, authorName, authorRole, rating, language, isPublished) VALUES
('On Hill Sport', 'Isaac brought authentic energy to our brand. His audience engagement was exceptional and the content quality exceeded expectations.', 'Dmitry Volkov', 'Marketing Director', 5, 'en', 1),
('On Hill Sport', 'Исаак привнес аутентичную энергию в наш бренд. Вовлеченность его аудитории была исключительной.', 'Dmitry Volkov', 'Marketing Director', 5, 'ru', 1),
('Keybell', 'Working with Isaac was a game-changer. His followers are exactly our target demographic - discerning, quality-focused men.', 'Elena Sokolov', 'CEO', 5, 'en', 1),
('Keybell', 'Сотрудничество с Исааком было переломным моментом. Его подписчики - это именно наша целевая аудитория.', 'Elena Sokolov', 'CEO', 5, 'ru', 1),
('Reboot', 'The production quality and authenticity of Isaacs content is unmatched. Highly recommended for premium brands.', 'Marco Rodriguez', 'Brand Manager', 5, 'en', 1),
('Reboot', 'La calidad de producción y autenticidad del contenido de Isaac es incomparable. Altamente recomendado para marcas premium.', 'Marco Rodriguez', 'Brand Manager', 5, 'es', 1);
